title: Work item (findings-graph node)
description: One spec'd unit of work: an audit finding, a BMAD story, or a change request with acceptance criteria. The normalizer emits these into state/findings-graph.json.

id.description: Stable unique id, e.g. ITEM-FIND-C1 or ITEM-M1.

target.description: Service / lib / portal the finding belongs to, e.g. ServiceA.

layer.description: Layer for DAG ordering (libs upstream of services upstream of portals).

theme.description: Theme taxonomy, e.g. security-multitenancy | money-correctness | deployability-oncall | product-scope | idempotency-dataflow | doc-drift | test-coverage.

fixType.description: mechanical = doc/health-check/tag/token/invariant; non-trivial = real logic/correctness; owner-decision = needs a human ruling; scope-stop = a product-scope red-line, NOT to be 'fixed' by adding the forbidden thing.

files.description: Repo-relative file paths the fix is expected to touch (the file-lock set).

dependsOn.description: Work-item ids that must be CLOSED before this one is schedulable.

ownerDecision.description: If non-null, the question the owner must answer before this can proceed; the item starts BLOCKED.

acceptance.description: The concrete, checkable acceptance criterion that defines 'fixed'.

regressionTest.description: Description of the red->green test that proves the fix: what must fail on old code and pass on new.

realInfra.description: True if a green EF-in-memory test does NOT close it (money/security/concurrency -> Testcontainers required).

gateSet.description: Band A of the review stage — the 5 BMAD role gates (dataflow.md § BMAD Review Gates).

reviewFlows.description: Band B/C of the review stage — BMAD review-named flows. Optional/informational: the driver (cmdSelect -> applicableReviewFlows) derives the LIVE applicable set from files[] against config/factory.config.json reviewFlows.appliesWhen at select time; the normalizer need not populate this.

autonomyTier.description: auto = drive to CLOSED autonomously; escalate = auto-draft then human sign-off before integrate (auth/money/crypto/cross-service); blocked = owner decision required first.

source.description: Provenance: the audit doc + anchor this was normalized from.

fixHint.description: The audit's suggested fix, carried verbatim where given.

cascade.description: For event-contract changes: producer + every consumer that must change together (dataflow.md cascade rule).
